stories.title: Jordy Frahm Named USA Softball Collegiate Player of the Year (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Nebraska's Jordy Frahm was just named USA Softball Collegiate Player of the Year.

Tomorrow, she takes the mound at the WCWS.

51-6. 26-game win streak. 2 earned runs in 33 NCAA tournament innings.

The best player in college softball is ready. 🥎 #Huskers #WCWS #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The timing doesn't get better than this.

Jordy Frahm wins USA Softball Player of the Year on Wednesday.

Nebraska plays their first WCWS game since 2013 on Thursday.

The honor. Then the moment. 🥎 #Huskers #WCWS #NCAASoftball

stories.title: WCWS Game 2 Preview — Tennessee vs. Texas, The 2025 Semifinal Rematch (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Tennessee has two First-Team All-Americans in the circle.

Pickens. Mardjetko. Same team. Same honor.

Their mission at the WCWS: beat Texas — the team that ended their 2025 season.

Thursday. 2:30 PM ET on ESPN. 🥎 #VolNation #WCWS #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Tennessee lost to Texas in the 2025 WCWS semifinals.

Now they open the 2026 WCWS against them.

Pickens vs. Stewart. Two All-Americans vs. 27 HRs and 72 RBIs.

Thursday. 2:30 PM ET. ESPN. 🥎 #VolNation #HookEm #WCWS

stories.title: Megan Grant's 40 HRs Enter Devon Park — UCLA vs. Alabama (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Megan Grant hit 40 home runs this season. That's the all-time NCAA record.

Thursday, she faces an Alabama staff that threw 22 shutouts in 2026.

The record-holder vs. the shutdown pitcher. 7 PM ET on ESPN2. 🥎

#GoBruins #RollTide #WCWS #NCAASoftball

stories.title: Arkansas WCWS Debut at 8:30 PM — Coach Deifel's 1-for-6 Moment (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Arkansas is playing their first-ever WCWS game tomorrow night.

Coach Deifel went 0-for-5 in super regionals before this season.

Now she's at Devon Park.

8:30 PM ET. ESPN2. Nebraska waiting. 🥎 #WoopigsWoooo #Huskers #WCWS

stories.title: WCWS 2026 Power Rankings — All 8 Teams Ranked by Championship Potential (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
WCWS 2026 Power Rankings:

1️⃣ Alabama (54-7, 22 shutouts)
2️⃣ Texas (defending champ)
3️⃣ Texas Tech (Canady, 1,100+ career Ks)
4️⃣ Tennessee (2 All-American pitchers)
5️⃣ Nebraska (26-game win streak)

Who am I wrong about? 🥎 #WCWS #NCAASoftball

stories.title: WCWS 2026 Bold Predictions — Upsets, Surprises, and a Champion (Tier 3)

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Three bold WCWS picks before Thursday's first pitch:

🔥 Mississippi State beats Texas Tech in the opener
🔥 Nebraska reaches the championship round
🔥 Alabama wins the 2026 national title

Check back June 5. 🥎 #WCWS #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball
